title: Hide Notice Boxes in Monday Docs
excerpt: The ability to hide or minimize Notice Boxes in a Monday Doc. This would be nice especially for printing a doc. For example, we have a Business Case template with an info box for each section so the person filling it out…

posts.author: kdemotts (kristen.demotts@arrowfinishing.com)
posts.cookedHtml: The ability to hide or minimize Notice Boxes in a Monday Doc. This would be nice especially for printing a doc. For example, we have a Business Case template with an info box for each section so the person filling it out has a guide for their content. I would like to be able to hide these boxes for the reader, and especially for printing.
